notes: Surface-deployed fabrication printers specialized for propulsion and power components: thrusters, reactors, generators, radiators, and ISRU modules.
printer_type: ship — can only build recipes whose output category is one of: thruster, reactor, generator, radiator, isru.
construction_rate_kg_per_hr increases with tech level, scaling build speed.
Multiple printers in 'construct' mode at the same facility pool their rates.
Draws electric_mw from the surface power bus during active operations.
